name: Los Angeles Debt Collection Agency
description_short: Los Angeles-based commercial and consumer debt collection agency that helps businesses recover overdue invoices and accounts receivable nationwide and internationally.
description_long:
Los Angeles Debt Collection Agency (LADC) is a debt collection firm based in Los Angeles, California, founded on principles of quality assurance, ethics, integrity, and performance. The company serves both commercial and consumer debt collection needs for businesses of all sizes operating nationally and internationally. LADC positions itself as a personalized alternative to larger debt collection agencies, emphasizing customized service and partnership-building with clients.

LADC offers commercial debt collection services focused on recovering overdue invoices and accounts receivable. Their service model includes claim placement, cash flow improvement strategies, and creditor rights protection. The company provides free consultations to assess individual business needs and tailors collection approaches accordingly. Their team works directly with office managers, dental offices, and business owners across various industries.

The company differentiates itself through leadership credentials and industry certifications. CEO Aaron Koppel holds IACC (International Association of Commercial Collectors) Certified Commercial Collector status and an ACA (Association of Credit and Collection Professionals) International Professional Collection Specialist Certificate. LADC emphasizes compliance, effective communication, and protecting client business reputation throughout the collection process. Customer reviews highlight ease of collaboration and effectiveness in collecting overdue accounts.

As a debt collection agency, LADC represents creditors seeking to recover owed funds rather than helping debtors manage or reduce debt. This is fundamentally different from debt settlement, consolidation, or management services. Businesses considering LADC should understand they are hiring a third-party collector and ensure their accounts truly warrant external collection action. No information is available regarding collection success rates, fee structures, or compliance histories.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: CEO holds IACC Certified Commercial Collector and ACA International Professional Collection Specialist certifications
Explicitly emphasizes compliance and adherence to collections industry laws and regulations
Offers free consultations with no apparent obligation before engaging services
Serves both commercial and consumer accounts across national and international markets
Multiple five-star reviews from business clients citing effective invoice recovery and good customer service
Customizes collection approach to individual client needs rather than one-size-fits-all strategy
Positioned as accessible alternative to large national collection agencies
cons: No information provided about fee structure, commission rates, or payment terms
No published data on collection success rates or recovery statistics
No details about complaint history, regulatory actions, or compliance record
Limited online presence and no third-party reviews beyond testimonials on their own website
No information about whether they pursue legal action or maintain in-house legal team
best_for: Small to mid-sized businesses with overdue B2B invoices seeking personalized collection service
Dental practices, medical offices, and professional services firms with recurring payment issues
Companies prioritizing creditor-agency relationship and business reputation protection over aggressive tactics
diagnosis: LADC is designed for established businesses needing third-party debt collection services for legitimate unpaid accounts, not for individual consumers seeking debt relief or reduction. Critical caveat: hiring a collection agency should be a last resort after internal collection efforts; ensure accounts are valid, debts are legitimate, and collection actions comply with FDCPA and state regulations before engagement.
services: Commercial debt collection for overdue invoices
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 155 W Washington Blvd Mezz-101, Los Angeles, CA 90015
